title: Bat Removal & Exclusion in Coney Island | $900-$2,500
metaDescription: Professional bat removal and exclusion services in Coney Island, Brooklyn. Safe, humane bat control for homes and businesses. Licensed experts. Call today for a free inspection!
intro: Coney Island's unique mix of historic homes, beachfront properties, and older apartment buildings can provide ideal entry points for bats seeking shelter. Best Pest Control NYC offers comprehensive bat removal and exclusion services throughout Coney Island, ensuring your property is bat-free and properly sealed against future intrusions. Our humane, effective methods protect both your family and these important wildlife species.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over 15 years of experience serving Coney Island residents with specialized bat removal expertise. Our licensed technicians understand Brooklyn's local bat species and building structures, providing thorough inspections, safe removal, complete exclusion work, and cleanup services with a satisfaction guarantee.
localContext: From the classic boardwalk bungalows near Brighton Beach Avenue to the pre-war buildings along Mermaid Avenue and Neptune Avenue, Coney Island's diverse architecture often features the gaps, vents, and attic spaces that attract bats. The proximity to the ocean and parks like Kaiser Park creates an environment where bat populations thrive, making professional exclusion essential for area homeowners.

faqs.question: Why are bats common in Coney Island homes?
faqs.answer: Coney Island's older housing stock, including wood-frame homes and pre-war buildings, often has small gaps in rooflines, vents, and soffits that bats exploit. The beachfront location and nearby green spaces provide abundant insects for bats to feed on, making the area attractive to bat colonies seeking nearby roosting sites.

faqs.question: How much does bat removal cost in Coney Island?
faqs.answer: Bat removal and exclusion services in Coney Island typically range from $900 to $2,500, depending on the size of the colony, number of entry points, and extent of exclusion work needed. This includes inspection, humane removal, sealing all entry points, and cleanup. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before any work begins.

faqs.question: Is bat removal in NYC regulated?
faqs.answer: Yes, bat removal in New York City must follow strict guidelines as many bat species are protected. Our licensed technicians use only humane exclusion methods that allow bats to leave but not return, typically performed outside of maternity season (June-July) to avoid separating mothers from pups. We comply with all NYC and state wildlife regulations.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove bats from my Coney Island property?
faqs.answer: We can typically schedule an inspection within 24-48 hours of your call. The exclusion process itself takes 1-3 days for installation, but bats must be given time to naturally exit (usually 3-7 days). Complete exclusion, including sealing and cleanup, is typically finished within 2 weeks, though timeline varies based on colony size and property complexity.
